name: Sample Review — Upsert
description: POST /webhook/sample-review-upsert. Body {client, sample, comments_base_at}. Guards (read-fail, phantom-row, comments_base_at conflict over SCALAR_FIELDS, __CLEAR_LINK__ + link carry-forward, 3-way comment merge). ALLOWED now includes thumb_rev + created_at; created_at defaulted to updated_at on CREATE only. Atomic sample_review_merge_comments RPC for the two tweak columns (Supabase service_role via supabaseApi cred). Fail-loud scalar mirror to sample_reviews. Best-effort append-only sample_review_events.

conditions.leftValue: ={{ ($('Read Existing Row').first().json && $('Read Existing Row').first().json.id) ? true : false }}

parameters.jsCode:
const sample = $('Strip Routing').first().json || {};
return [{ json: { ok: true, sample } }];
